fields.name: pensioner_id
fields.description: Stable pensioner identifier (issue #14).

fields.name: pensioner_name
fields.description: 'last, first' name format. v2 view derives display name from this.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Decision status: auto_accept, needs_review, low_score, no_candidates, ambiguous, error. Canonical values in scripts.pipeline.scoring_constants.

fields.name: best_score
fields.description: Top score across ranked_candidates in [0, 1].

fields.name: ranked_candidates
fields.description: Engine-specific scored candidates (FaG or Newspapers). See `common.candidates` for the engine-agnostic projection.

fields.name: fag_records
fields.description: FaG-shaped duplicate of ranked_candidates (back-compat with v1 view consumers).

fields.name: _policy_version
fields.description: DecisionPolicy version that produced the status field. Versioned per CONTEXT.md so a replay can recover the exact rule.

fields.name: _schema_version
fields.description: Projection schema version (this file's source of truth). v2+; absent means v1 (legacy).

fields.name: badges
fields.description: Corroboration badges: cgr_match, spouse_match, dd_match. Computed by ProjectionBuilder from observations.

fields.name: common
fields.description: Engine-agnostic projection (issue #39). Carries id, title, engine, status, best_score, candidates, corroboration.

fields.name: pensioner_first
fields.description: First name. v1 names: pensioner_-prefixed; the row may also carry the un-prefixed first_name.

fields.name: pensioner_middle
fields.description: Middle name or initial.

fields.name: pensioner_last
fields.description: Last name.

fields.name: pensioner_app_number
fields.description: Application number from the OK pensioners record.

fields.name: pensioner_birth_year
fields.description: Birth year if known.

fields.name: pensioner_death_year
fields.description: Death year if known.

fields.name: regiment
fields.description: CW regiment from the pensioner record.

fields.name: company
fields.description: CW company letter.

fields.name: pensioncard_backlink
fields.description: URL back to the digitalprairie.ok.gov pension card.

fields.name: pensioncard_iiif_url
fields.description: IIIF image URL for the pension card.

fields.name: pensioncard_pages
fields.description: IIIF page IDs (issue #62). v2 view builds IIIF URLs from these.

fields.name: pensioner_spouse_first
fields.description: Spouse first name (widow cross-reference).

fields.name: pensioner_spouse_middle
fields.description: Spouse middle name.

fields.name: pensioner_spouse_last
fields.description: Spouse last name.

fields.name: backlink
fields.description: URL back to the pensioner record itself (not the candidate).

fields.name: cgr_match
fields.description: CGR corroboration evidence. Populated by the observation_enrichment post-pass.

fields.name: dd_match
fields.description: DixieData match evidence. Populated by the observation_enrichment post-pass.

fields.name: spouse_match
fields.description: Spouse cross-reference evidence. Populated by the observation_enrichment post-pass.
